case_title: ORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. SHOHREH KHAZRAEI

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KHAZRAEI, SHOHREH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-22-2012
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 595(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAR-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KHAZRAEI, SHOHREH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KHAZRAEI, SHOHREH
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1) INTEREST 2) COSTS (CCP 1033) 3) ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KHAZRAEI, SHOHREH $5,098.67 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,382.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
